mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_report_tbl BR JOIN board_tbl B ON BR.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO JOIN member_tbl M ON BR.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO

SELECT BR.BOARD_REPORT_NO AS reportNo, BR.BOARD_NO AS contentNo, BR.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.BOARD_TITLE AS title, LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(B.BOARD_CONTENT, '<[^>]*>', ''), 70) AS content, BR.REPORT_REASON AS reportReason, BR.DETAIL AS detail, BR.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, DATE_FORMAT(BR.REPORT_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reportDate, R.MEMBER_ID AS reporter, W.MEMBER_ID AS writer, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_report_tbl BR2 WHERE BR2.BOARD_NO = BR.BOARD_NO ) AS reportCount FROM board_report_tbl BR JOIN board_tbl B ON BR.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO JOIN member_tbl R ON BR.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN member_tbl W ON B.MEMBER_NO = W.MEMBER_NO
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
ORDER BY BR.REPORT_DATE ASC
ORDER BY BR.REPORT_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment_report_tbl BCR JOIN board_comment_tbl BC ON BCR.BOARD_COMMENT_NO = BC.BOARD_COMMENT_NO JOIN board_tbl B ON BC.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO JOIN member_tbl R ON BCR.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN member_tbl W ON BC.MEMBER_NO = W.MEMBER_NO

SELECT BCR.COMMENT_REPORT_NO AS reportNo, BCR.BOARD_COMMENT_NO AS contentNo, B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.BOARD_TITLE AS title, LEFT(BC.BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT, 70) AS content, BCR.REPORT_REASON AS reportReason, BCR.DETAIL AS detail, BCR.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, DATE_FORMAT(BCR.REPORT_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reportDate, R.MEMBER_ID AS reporter, W.MEMBER_ID AS writer, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment_report_tbl BCR2 WHERE BCR2.BOARD_COMMENT_NO = BCR.BOARD_COMMENT_NO ) AS reportCount FROM board_comment_report_tbl BCR JOIN board_comment_tbl BC ON BCR.BOARD_COMMENT_NO = BC.BOARD_COMMENT_NO JOIN board_tbl B ON BC.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO JOIN member_tbl R ON BCR.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO JOIN member_tbl W ON BC.MEMBER_NO = W.MEMBER_NO
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
ORDER BY BCR.REPORT_DATE ASC
ORDER BY BCR.REPORT_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rest_report_tbl RR JOIN restaurant_tbl R ON RR.REST_NO = R.REST_NO JOIN member_tbl M ON RR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT RR.REST_RP_NO AS reportNo, RR.REST_NO AS contentNo, R.REST_NAME AS title, LEFT(R.REST_CONTENT, 70) AS content, RR.REASON AS reportReason, RR.DETAIL AS detail, RR.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, DATE_FORMAT(RR.REPORT_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reportDate, RM.MEMBER_ID AS reporter, R.MEMBER_ID AS writer, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rest_report_tbl RR2 WHERE RR2.REST_NO = RR.REST_NO ) AS reportCount FROM rest_report_tbl RR JOIN restaurant_tbl R ON RR.REST_NO = R.REST_NO JOIN member_tbl RM ON RR.MEMBER_ID = RM.MEMBER_ID JOIN member_tbl WM ON R.MEMBER_ID = WM.MEMBER_ID
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
ORDER BY RR.REPORT_DATE ASC
ORDER BY RR.REPORT_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_report_tbl RRP JOIN review_tbl RV ON RRP.REVIEW_NO = RV.REVIEW_NO JOIN restaurant_tbl RT ON RV.REST_NO = RT.REST_NO JOIN member_tbl M ON RRP.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT RRP.REVIEW_RP_NO AS reportNo, RRP.REVIEW_NO AS contentNo, RRP.REVIEW_NO AS reviewNo, RT.REST_NAME AS title, LEFT(RV.REVIEW_CONTENT, 70) AS content, RV.RATING AS rating, RRP.REASON AS reportReason, RRP.DETAIL AS detail, RRP.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, DATE_FORMAT(RRP.CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reportDate, RRP.MEMBER_ID AS reporter, RV.MEMBER_ID AS writer, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_report_tbl RRP2 WHERE RRP2.REVIEW_NO = RRP.REVIEW_NO ) AS reportCount FROM review_report_tbl RRP JOIN review_tbl RV ON RRP.REVIEW_NO = RV.REVIEW_NO JOIN restaurant_tbl RT ON RV.REST_NO = RT.REST_NO JOIN member_tbl RM ON RRP.MEMBER_ID = RM.MEMBER_ID JOIN member_tbl WM ON RV.MEMBER_ID = WM.MEMBER_ID
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
ORDER BY RRP.CREATED_AT ASC
ORDER BY RRP.CREATED_AT DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comment_report_tbl RCR JOIN review_comment_tbl RC ON RCR.COMMENT_NO = RC.COMMENT_NO JOIN review_tbl RV ON RC.REVIEW_NO = RV.REVIEW_NO JOIN restaurant_tbl RT ON RV.REST_NO = RT.REST_NO JOIN member_tbl M ON RCR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT RCR.REVIEW_COM_RP_NO AS reportNo, RCR.COMMENT_NO AS contentNo, RV.REVIEW_NO AS reviewNo, RT.REST_NAME AS title, LEFT(RC.CONTENT, 70) AS content, RCR.REASON AS reportReason, RCR.DETAIL AS detail, RCR.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus, DATE_FORMAT(RCR.CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS reportDate, RCR.MEMBER_ID AS reporter, RC.MEMBER_ID AS writer, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_comment_report_tbl RCR2 WHERE RCR2.COMMENT_NO = RCR.COMMENT_NO ) AS reportCount FROM review_comment_report_tbl RCR JOIN review_comment_tbl RC ON RCR.COMMENT_NO = RC.COMMENT_NO JOIN review_tbl RV ON RC.REVIEW_NO = RV.REVIEW_NO JOIN restaurant_tbl RT ON RV.REST_NO = RT.REST_NO JOIN member_tbl RM ON RCR.MEMBER_ID = RM.MEMBER_ID JOIN member_tbl WM ON RC.MEMBER_ID = WM.MEMBER_ID
ORDER BY reportCount DESC
ORDER BY RCR.CREATED_AT ASC
ORDER BY RCR.CREATED_AT DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
